  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "XPRS Cadres is a people&rsquo;s management company founded to recruit and outsource semi-skilled/unskilled manpower (blue collar) personnel to client satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Marina / Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Welcome and attend to customers in a warm and professional manner
	Help customers choose itemsthat suit their style, size, and needs
	Provide product information (sizes, materials, pricing, and care tips)
	Upsell and cross-sell related items
	Maintain cleanliness and proper arrangement of the store and displays
	Restock shelves and monitor inventory levels
	Handle customer complaints or returns politely and efficiently
	Stay updated on new arrivals, trends, and promotions.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, or HND with at least 1 year of experience.


Salary
N100,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;Samson.olorunda@xprs-group.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;For more informationCall/Whatsapp:&nbsp;08168578335.",

Sales Representative Job at XPRS Cadres




        
    

        
        XPRS Cadres is a people’s management company founded to recruit and outsource semi-skilled/unskilled manpower (blue collar) personnel to client satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Marina / Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Welcome and attend to customers in a warm and professional manner
	Help customers choose itemsthat suit their style, size, and needs
	Provide product information (sizes, materials, pricing, and care tips)
	Upsell and cross-sell related items
	Maintain cleanliness and proper arrangement of the store and displays
	Restock shelves and monitor inventory levels
	Handle customer complaints or returns politely and efficiently
	Stay updated on new arrivals, trends, and promotions.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, or HND with at least 1 year of experience.


Salary
N100,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more informationCall/Whatsapp: 08168578335.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experienced Accountant",
  "description": "Axion Global Engineering Company Limited is a leading engineering and construction solutions provider, specializing in high-performance construction chemicals, protective coatings, and technical solutions for Nigeria&rsquo;s infrastructure, real estate, and industrial sectors. We are currently expanding our commercial team and seeking experienced industry professionals to drive business growth across our Lagos, Port Harcourt, and Abuja offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Accountant

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Accountant will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring accurate reporting, maintaining compliance with statutory requirements, and supporting sound financial decision-making across the organization.
	This role requires a highly experienced accounting professional with strong knowledge of corporate accounting, project-based accounting, and operational finance within construction, engineering, or related industries.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records and ledgers.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.&nbsp;
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.&nbsp;
	Oversee payroll preparation and staff reimbursements.&nbsp;
	Perform bank reconciliations and cash flow management.&nbsp;
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, WHT, Company Income Tax).&nbsp;
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning activities.&nbsp;
	Monitor project cost tracking and expense allocations.&nbsp;
	Liaise with auditors and support external audit processes.&nbsp;
	Ensure proper documentation of all financial transactions.&nbsp;
	Provide financial reports and insights to management.


Requirements (Strict &ndash; Non-Negotiable)


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	4&ndash;7 years of proven accounting experience (mandatory).&nbsp;
	Professional certification is an advantage (ICAN, ACCA preferred).&nbsp;
	Experience in construction, engineering, manufacturing, or project-based environment is highly required.&nbsp;
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards.&nbsp;
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, ERP systems).&nbsp;
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.&nbsp;
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.&nbsp;
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple responsibilities.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary package.
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing engineering company.&nbsp;
	Exposure to large-scale infrastructure and construction projects.&nbsp;
	Career development and professional growth opportunities.&nbsp;
	Collaborative and structured work environment.


Method of Application
Interested candidates and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;linda.jumbo@axionafrica.org&nbsp;using &quot;Accountant &ndash; Lagos / Port Harcourt / Abuja&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-28",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Axion Global Engineering Company Limited"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

  },

Experienced Accountant Job at Axion Global Engineering Company Limited




        
    

        
        Axion Global Engineering Company Limited is a leading engineering and construction solutions provider, specializing in high-performance construction chemicals, protective coatings, and technical solutions for Nigeria’s infrastructure, real estate, and industrial sectors. We are currently expanding our commercial team and seeking experienced industry professionals to drive business growth across our Lagos, Port Harcourt, and Abuja offices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Accountant

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring accurate reporting, maintaining compliance with statutory requirements, and supporting sound financial decision-making across the organization.
	This role requires a highly experienced accounting professional with strong knowledge of corporate accounting, project-based accounting, and operational finance within construction, engineering, or related industries.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records and ledgers.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements. 
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes. 
	Oversee payroll preparation and staff reimbursements. 
	Perform bank reconciliations and cash flow management. 
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, WHT, Company Income Tax). 
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning activities. 
	Monitor project cost tracking and expense allocations. 
	Liaise with auditors and support external audit processes. 
	Ensure proper documentation of all financial transactions. 
	Provide financial reports and insights to management.


Requirements (Strict – Non-Negotiable)


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	4–7 years of proven accounting experience (mandatory). 
	Professional certification is an advantage (ICAN, ACCA preferred). 
	Experience in construction, engineering, manufacturing, or project-based environment is highly required. 
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards. 
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, ERP systems). 
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills. 
	High level of integrity and confidentiality. 
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple responsibilities.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary package.
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing engineering company. 
	Exposure to large-scale infrastructure and construction projects. 
	Career development and professional growth opportunities. 
	Collaborative and structured work environment.


Method of Application
Interested candidates and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Accountant – Lagos / Port Harcourt / Abuja" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Job Summary


	The Customer Service Representative will be responsible for interacting with customers, managing inquiries, resolving complaints, and ensuring a seamless customer experience across our service channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and assist customers in a professional and friendly manner
	Handle customer inquiries, requests, and complaints promptly
	Process customer orders accurately (online and in-person)
	Ensure a smooth and pleasant experience for every customer
	Manage phone calls, emails, and social media inquiries
	Maintain updated knowledge of menu items and promotions
	Work closely with other departments to resolve customer concerns
	Ensure compliance with company policies and service standards
	Provide administrative support as required


Important Requirement


	Applicants must reside very close to Surulere, Lekki Phase 1, Maruwa, Admiralty, or Ikate.
	(This is mandatory due to proximity to the work location.)

	OND / HND / B.Sc in any field
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in customer service or a similar role
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong problem-solving abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office is an added advantage
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Must be customer-focused, patient, and well-organized
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary of N150,000 monthly
	Opportunities for growth and career development
	Supportive and friendly work environment


Method of Application&nbsp;

Customer Service Representative Job at Uncle Stan's Food




        
    

        
        Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small shops or pizza. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	The Customer Service Representative will be responsible for interacting with customers, managing inquiries, resolving complaints, and ensuring a seamless customer experience across our service channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and assist customers in a professional and friendly manner
	Handle customer inquiries, requests, and complaints promptly
	Process customer orders accurately (online and in-person)
	Ensure a smooth and pleasant experience for every customer
	Manage phone calls, emails, and social media inquiries
	Maintain updated knowledge of menu items and promotions
	Work closely with other departments to resolve customer concerns
	Ensure compliance with company policies and service standards
	Provide administrative support as required


Important Requirement


	Applicants must reside very close to Surulere, Lekki Phase 1, Maruwa, Admiralty, or Ikate.
	(This is mandatory due to proximity to the work location.)


Qualifications:


	OND / HND / B.Sc in any field
	1–3 years of experience in customer service or a similar role
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong problem-solving abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office is an added advantage
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Must be customer-focused, patient, and well-organized
	Ability to work independently and within a team.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary of N150,000 monthly
	Opportunities for growth and career development
	Supportive and friendly work environment

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative / Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Lagos Food Bank is a non-profit, nutrition-focused initiative committed to fighting hunger, reducing food waste and solving the problem of malnutrition through targeted programs that seek to improve the nutrition/food intake of pregnant women and their infants who are not able to get the required nutrient during pregnancy and breastfeeding of their babies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Administrative / Procurement Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job


	Are you highly organized, detail-oriented, and passionate about making a social impact? Join our team at Lagos Food Bank Initiative as an Administrative / Fleet / Procurement Officer and play a key role in supporting our operations and logistics.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day administrative warehouse operations to ensure efficiency
	Manage and coordinate the organization&rsquo;s vehicle fleet (maintenance, tracking, scheduling)
	Handle procurement processes, including sourcing vendors, negotiating contracts, and managing inventory
	Ensure compliance with procurement policies and cost-effectiveness
	Maintain accurate records and documentation for all administrative and procurement activities
	Support logistics for food distribution and outreach programs


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Logistics, Supply Chain, or a related field
	1 -&nbsp; 2 years of relevant experience in administration, fleet, or procurement roles
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	High level of integrity and accountability
	Must reside within close proximity to the Food Bank&rsquo;s warehouse for ease of access and operational efficiency


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@lagosfoodbank.org&nbsp;using &quot;Administrative/Procurement Officer Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Administrative / Procurement Officer Job at Lagos Food Bank




        
    

        
        Lagos Food Bank is a non-profit, nutrition-focused initiative committed to fighting hunger, reducing food waste and solving the problem of malnutrition through targeted programs that seek to improve the nutrition/food intake of pregnant women and their infants who are not able to get the required nutrient during pregnancy and breastfeeding of their babies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative / Procurement Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you highly organized, detail-oriented, and passionate about making a social impact? Join our team at Lagos Food Bank Initiative as an Administrative / Fleet / Procurement Officer and play a key role in supporting our operations and logistics.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee day-to-day administrative warehouse operations to ensure efficiency
	Manage and coordinate the organization’s vehicle fleet (maintenance, tracking, scheduling)
	Handle procurement processes, including sourcing vendors, negotiating contracts, and managing inventory
	Ensure compliance with procurement policies and cost-effectiveness
	Maintain accurate records and documentation for all administrative and procurement activities
	Support logistics for food distribution and outreach programs


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Logistics, Supply Chain, or a related field
	1 -  2 years of relevant experience in administration, fleet, or procurement roles
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management abilities
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	High level of integrity and accountability
	Must reside within close proximity to the Food Bank’s warehouse for ease of access and operational efficiency


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using "Administrative/Procurement Officer Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "News Anchor & Business Journalist",
  "description": "The Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group Plc is an impact investor focused on emerging markets. The NCDFGroup acts as a strategic umbrella for a diverse range of emerging ventures, encompassing Financial Technology, Affordable Green Housing &amp; Renewable Energy, Entertainment &amp; Media and Training &amp; Mobility sectors. Our aim is to establish financially viable businesses that solve social and environmental problems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;News Anchor &amp; Business Journalist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Job Type: Full-time

What this Role is Abut:


	Presenting high-quality business, economy, markets, policy, and leadership content across multiple formats
	Leading or contributing to interviews, explainers, news analysis, special features, and editorial conversations
	Helping develop original content concepts for LiveTV, digital video, podcasts, and flagship interview formats
	Translating complex economic, corporate, and policy developments into clear, compelling, audience-relevant stories
	Working with editorial and production teams to create content that is serious, modern, credible, and distinctive
	Supporting ForeMedia&rsquo;s positioning as a trusted media and intelligence platform for executives, investors, policymakers, founders, and globally aware professionals.


Requirements
We are looking for someone who brings:


	Strong on-camera presence and editorial confidence
	Excellent journalism, interviewing, and storytelling ability
	A sharp interest in business, markets, economics, public policy, innovation, and global affairs
	Creativity in format design, scripting, live presentation, and audience engagement
	The ability to move comfortably across breaking coverage, analysis, executive interviews, and thought-leadership content
	Professional presence, intellectual curiosity, and the discipline to operate within a premium editorial environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;career@ncdfgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-14",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "The Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",

News Anchor & Business Journalist Job at the Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group




        
    

        
        The Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group Plc is an impact investor focused on emerging markets. The NCDFGroup acts as a strategic umbrella for a diverse range of emerging ventures, encompassing Financial Technology, Affordable Green Housing & Renewable Energy, Entertainment & Media and Training & Mobility sectors. Our aim is to establish financially viable businesses that solve social and environmental problems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: News Anchor & Business Journalist

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Job Type: Full-time

What this Role is Abut:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Presenting high-quality business, economy, markets, policy, and leadership content across multiple formats
	Leading or contributing to interviews, explainers, news analysis, special features, and editorial conversations
	Helping develop original content concepts for LiveTV, digital video, podcasts, and flagship interview formats
	Translating complex economic, corporate, and policy developments into clear, compelling, audience-relevant stories
	Working with editorial and production teams to create content that is serious, modern, credible, and distinctive
	Supporting ForeMedia’s positioning as a trusted media and intelligence platform for executives, investors, policymakers, founders, and globally aware professionals.


Requirements
We are looking for someone who brings:


	Strong on-camera presence and editorial confidence
	Excellent journalism, interviewing, and storytelling ability
	A sharp interest in business, markets, economics, public policy, innovation, and global affairs
	Creativity in format design, scripting, live presentation, and audience engagement
	The ability to move comfortably across breaking coverage, analysis, executive interviews, and thought-leadership content
	Professional presence, intellectual curiosity, and the discipline to operate within a premium editorial environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
